typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Fix still relies on wrapper/procedural invocation (`scripts/validate-milestone.sh` and `commands.validate`) and does not prove a non-bypassable user-testing runtime finalization gate before success synthesis.
Carried forward: no new fix feature in this rerun addressed missing machine-auditable implementation SHA linkage for compile-drift scope traceability.
Carried forward: no new fix feature in this rerun addressed malformed/non-resolvable handoff commit linkage for xcresulttool modernization traceability.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Route validator/runtime infrastructure features (services.yaml, validation scripts, .factory/library validator contracts) to an infra/validation-aligned skill instead of switcher UI/integration skills.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In milestone misc-infra-followups, both `misc-infra-wire-generic-flow-report-enforcement-into-validator-runtime` and `misc-infra-integrate-flow-report-enforcement-into-validator-execution-path` were assigned `switcher-integration-worker`, and scrutiny repeatedly found unresolved validator-runtime contract gaps.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update shared knowledge docs to assert exactly which runtime consumes `.factory/services.yaml` `commands.validate` today.
